templates.title: Workflow Queue Starter
templates.summary: A minimal local-first queue app with embedded SQLite, runtime search, and a product-shaped review flow.

templates.title: Research Desk
templates.summary: A local archive review workflow with scoped filesystem access, allowlisted indexing, queue export, and reader windows.

templates.title: Dispatch Room
templates.summary: A status-heavy incident workflow that shows how to structure a dense triage board around a local SQLite model.

templates.title: Prism Gallery
templates.summary: A media-forward reference layout for asset review and library-style browsing.

templates.title: Quill Studio
templates.summary: An editorial workflow template for teams that need structured story status, assignment, and review state.

templates.title: Svelte Vite Starter
templates.summary: A dev-server starter for teams that want Svelte while RustFrame still owns the desktop runtime.
